chapter_context.summary: Summarizes Jeremiah's twenty-three years of ministry, prophesies seventy years of Babylonian exile, and depicts the cup of fury poured out on all nations.

outline.text: Summarizing Twenty-Three Years of Unheeded Preaching
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Summarizing Twenty-Three Years of Unheeded Preaching (25:1-7), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Jeremiah.

outline.text: Prophesying Seventy-Year Babylonian Exile and Desolation
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Prophesying Seventy-Year Babylonian Exile and Desolation (25:8-14), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Jeremiah.

outline.text: Wine cup of God's Fury Poured Out on All Nations
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Wine cup of God's Fury Poured Out on All Nations (25:15-29), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Jeremiah.

outline.text: Lord Roaring from High; Slaughter of Shepherds
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Lord Roaring from High; Slaughter of Shepherds (25:30-38), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Jeremiah.

key_themes.title: Prophecy of Warning
key_themes.description: This chapter explores key facets of prophecy of warning, revealing how God's holy character directs both judgment and redemption.

key_themes.title: The Weeping Prophet
key_themes.description: Jeremiah's deep emotional connection to the message and the people, illustrating the heart of God breaking for His children's rebellion.

devotional.question: Reflecting on the warnings and historical accounts of Chapter 25, in what ways does Jeremiah's call to faithfulness encourage you in your own walk today?
How does this chapter prompt you to choose covenant obedience and trust in God's promises of restoration over temporary security?

cultural_historical.title: The Fall of Jerusalem and the Exile
cultural_historical.text: The historical backdrop of Jeremiah's ministry, witnessing the gradual collapse of Judah under the Babylonian Empire and the destruction of the Temple.
